name: Village Performance Center
address: 167 Ashland Ave side entrance, Buffalo, NY 14222
about: Village Performance Center (VPC) is a boutique fitness and recovery hub located in Elmwood Village. The venue offers a holistic approach to health and wellness, combining fitness spaces with recovery options and high-quality amenities. Their services include a private gym, infrared saunas, cold plunge therapy, and a golf simulator. VPC provides flexible memberships and one-time services tailored to help individuals feel their best in a welcoming, community-centered environment. The venue operates from 5:30 AM to 10 PM, offering convenience with street and city-paid lot parking and an on-site shower.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing golf simulator with stunning graphics and gameplay
Ability to play on world-class courses rain or shine
Flexible hourly rentals and membership options for simulator access
Option to pair golf sessions with fitness and recovery services

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of alcohol service; BYOB not indicated

simulator_hardware.notes: Top-notch sports simulation system; specific model not mentioned

faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the time required to play 18 holes. Simulator time is typically rented by the hour, so the duration would depend on the number of players and pace of play.
